faq.question: Does Claude have a free plan?
faq.answer: Yes, Claude offers a free plan, but usage limits and available models can change.

faq.question: What is Claude best at?
faq.answer: Claude is strongest for long document analysis, polished writing, research synthesis, careful reasoning, and code explanation.

faq.question: Can Claude analyze PDFs and documents?
faq.answer: Claude is designed for document-heavy workflows, including reviewing lengthy source material within plan and file limits.

faq.question: Can Claude generate images?
faq.answer: This review does not treat Claude as a built-in image generation tool; choose a visual generation product if that is your primary need.

faq.question: Can Claude write code?
faq.answer: Yes. Claude can explain code, suggest changes, and help debug implementation details.

faq.question: Is Claude better than ChatGPT?
faq.answer: Claude often stands out for long-context writing and careful document analysis, while ChatGPT may be preferable for users who need its broader tool ecosystem.

faq.question: Does Claude work for teams?
faq.answer: Yes, Claude has team-oriented workspace options, but teams should confirm limits, administration needs, and data policies before rollout.

faq.question: What are Claude’s main limitations?
faq.answer: The main tradeoffs are usage limits, plan-dependent pricing, fewer broad ecosystem integrations, and less fit for visual design or image generation.

faq.question: Who should use Claude?
faq.answer: Writers, researchers, developers, analysts, and business teams that work with long documents and polished communication are good fits.

faq.question: Who should avoid Claude?
faq.answer: Teams focused on image generation, graphic design, spreadsheet-heavy workflows, or IDE-native coding automation may want a more specialized tool.

faq.question: How much does Claude cost?
faq.answer: Claude has a free plan plus paid individual, team, and enterprise options; verify the current pricing page for exact prices and limits.

faq.question: What should I check before buying Claude?
faq.answer: Confirm model access, message limits, document limits, data policies, collaboration features, and whether the plan supports your workflow.

notFor.title: Image-generation-first teams
notFor.description: Claude is not ideal if the main job is creating images, ad visuals, or graphic design assets.

notFor.title: Spreadsheet-heavy operators
notFor.description: Teams that need deep spreadsheet formulas, pivots, and workbook automation may prefer a spreadsheet-native tool.

notFor.title: IDE-only coding workflows
notFor.description: Developers who want in-editor agent actions, terminal control, and Git automation may prefer a dedicated AI coding editor.
